title: Collect, store and administer colostrum
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Collect, store and administer colostrum demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Obtain colostrum

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain, check and sterilise equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain, check and sterilise equipment.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Identify and select donor animals and collect colostrum
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select donor animals and collect colostrum?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select donor animals and collect colostrum.

pcs.text: Test and select stored frozen colostrum for use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test and select stored frozen colostrum for use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test and select stored frozen colostrum for use.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Obtain colostrum

elements.title: Administer colostrum to newborn animals

pcs.text: Identify newborn animals requiring supplementary colostrum
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify newborn animals requiring supplementary colostrum?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify newborn animals requiring supplementary colostrum.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and prepare feeding equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and prepare feeding equipment.

pcs.text: Thaw frozen colostrum at room temperature
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Thaw frozen colostrum at room temperature?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Thaw frozen colostrum at room temperature.

pcs.text: Warm thawed colostrum to body temperature
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Warm thawed colostrum to body temperature?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Warm thawed colostrum to body temperature.

pcs.text: Administer warmed or fresh colostrum to newborn animals according to individual animal requirements and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Administer warmed or fresh colostrum to newborn animals according to individual animal requirements and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Administer warmed or fresh colostrum to newborn animals according to individual animal requirements and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor newborn animals after administration of colostrum and repeat colostrum feeds as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor newborn animals after administration of colostrum and repeat colostrum feeds as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor newborn animals after administration of colostrum and repeat colostrum feeds as required.

pcs.text: Handle newborn animals using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle newborn animals using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle newborn animals using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Administer colostrum to newborn animals

elements.title: Store colostrum

pcs.text: Filter colostrum according to workplace procedures and place in appropriate container
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Filter colostrum according to workplace procedures and place in appropriate container?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Filter colostrum according to workplace procedures and place in appropriate container.

pcs.text: Freeze surplus colostrum for future use and label container with details of donor animal and date of collection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Freeze surplus colostrum for future use and label container with details of donor animal and date of collection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Freeze surplus colostrum for future use and label container with details of donor animal and date of collection.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Store colostrum

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
